description: Capability set for the share-detail window. Receives event list via IPC; uses window.open() (Web API, no shell plugin needed) for the HQ Console link. Share reactions + reply: the window additionally invokes toggle_reaction / fetch_reactions (messageScope 'share:{eventId}', messageId = eventId), set_watched_shares (registers the visible share eventIds with the SINGLE DM poll path so a 'reaction' wake re-fetches and emits message:reaction), and open_messages_window (the 'Message the sharer' action deep-links the Messages window with a pending conversation target).
